items.title: Watch: BBC at site of deadly Russian attack on Kyiv flats
items.dek: Sarah Rainsford reports from the completely destroyed nine-storey block of flats in Ukraine's capital.

items.title: Watch: PM's former top aide on Starmer's first call with Trump
items.dek: Trump was more 'funny' than he had been expecting, Morgan McSweeney told the BBC.
